LAW AND MOTION 302, THE LIBERATION LAW GROUP'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF AARON JOHNSON IS CONTINUED FROM SEPTEMBER 2, 2015 TO SEPTEMBER 11, 2015 AT 9:30 A.M., IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING/REPLY PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN SEPTEMBER 2, 2015 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSING PAPERS. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED. =302/EG

DISCOVERY, 302, THE UNOPPOSED MOTION OF DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT FOR AN ORDER COMPELLING PLAINTIFF TO SERVE VERIFIED RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT'S SECOND SET OF FORM INTERROGATORIES AND TO DEEM ADMITTED ALL MATTERS IN DEFENDANT'S SECOND SET OF REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS AND FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF SHALL SERVE FULL AND COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTION, TO DEFENDANT'S SECOND SET OF FORM INTERROGATORIES, WITHIN 30 DAYS AFTER NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. THE TRUTH OF THE MATTERS SPECIFIED IN THE INDIVIDUALLY NUMBERED REQUESTS IN DEFENDANT'S SECOND SET OF REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION SHALL BE DEEMED ADMITTED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO PAY DEFENDANT SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $705, WITHIN 30 DAYS AFTER NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARGARET NIVER, CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel And Deem Matters Admitted And Request For Sanctions As Against Plaintiff
Off Calendar Jan-27-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. FRANCES M. VALDEZ, ESQ. of Lozano Smith, Tel No. 925-953-1620 appearing for Defendant San Francisco Unified School District;
No other appearances made in this matter.

Defense counsel stipulates to the matter being heard by the pro tem judge. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. The unopposed motion of defendant San Francisco Unified School District for an order compelling Plaintiff to serve verified responses to Defendant's Second Set of Form Interrogatories and to deem admitted all matters in Defendant's Second Set of Requests for Admissions and for sanctions is GRANTED. Plaintiff shall serve full and complete verified responses, without objection, to Defendant's Second Set of Form Interrogatories, within 30 days after notice of entry of this order. The truth of the matters specified in the individually numbered requests in Defendant's Second Set of Requests for Admission shall be deemed admitted. Plaintiff is ordered to pay Defendant sanctions in the amount of $705, within 30 days after notice of entry of this order. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro Tem: Margaret Niver, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
